attributes.title: Wadsworth Y Tri

attributes.name: description
attributes.content: All proceeds go directly to the Riverfront YMCA's Annual Campaign Fun dedicated to supporting members by making our programs and memberships more accessible.

field_event_description.value:
The Wadsworth YMCA invites you to participate in the Wadsworth Youth Triathlon!!!

Join us August 2nd, 2026 and test your might in a race that starts in the water, moves onto bikes, and finishes off in a foot race!

The Y-Tri is open to both members and non members ages 6-18. Registration runs May 1st - July 17th and is $40 for members and $55 for nonmembers. 

Interested in being a sponsor? Click Here

Volunteer Sign Up

Event Details

Registration

1 Mile Run Course.5 Mile Run Course.25 Mile Run Course

1 Mile Bike Course

 

RACE DETAILS

Age Divisions

15-18 Years (up to graduating senior)

12-14 Years

9-11 Years

6-8 Years

Race Distances

Ages 15-18 Years

Swim: 400 Yards

Bike: 5 Miles

Run: 2 Mile

Ages 12-14 Years

Swim: 200 Yards

Bike: 3 Miles

Run: 1 Mile

Ages 9-11 Years

Swim: 100 Yards

Bike: 2 Miles

Run: .5 Miles

Ages 6-8 Years

Swim: 25 Yards

Bike: 1 Miles

Run: .25 Miles

attributes.name: title
attributes.content: Fore the Kids Golf Outing | YMCA Akron

field_event_description.value:
Feel like the pro you are while playing the scenic splendor of Portage Country Club and supporting the Y's Mission of putting Christian principles into practice through programs that build healthy spirit, mind and body for all. 

100% of ALL PROCEEDS benefit the AKRON AREA YMCA --
staying local and helping local.

Monday, August 3, 2026
Portage Country Club

12:00 Noon - Lunch and Registration
1:00 p.m. -  Shotgun Start!
5:30 p.m.  - Dinner, Raffle, Awards
How will you chip in this year?

SIGN UP TO PLAY OR BECOME A SPONSOR

Sponsors, at certain levels, will also receive green fees, lunch and dinner. Playing tees are sold as a foursome--no individual spots are available.

QUESTIONS? Send us an email!

attributes.name: title
attributes.content: Green Y's Dry Tri | YMCA Akron

field_event_description.value:
THE GREEN FAMILY YMCA 2026 DRY TRI

Join us at the Green Y on August 8th for our annual Dry Triathlon! 

Show off your talents in three amazing events!!!

Events include:

  • 2 miles Rowing (on a Concept 2 Rower)
  • 10 miles Biking (Stationary Bike)
  • 3.1 miles Running (Around Y Parking Lot)

COST: $30/Individual or $75/3 person team

You can register for the event in branch at the front desk or online by clicking the button below. 

REGISTER ONLINE HERE

attributes.title: Grape Falls & Craft Brews 2026

attributes.name: title
attributes.content: Grape Falls & Craft Brews 2026 | YMCA Akron

attributes.name: description
attributes.content: All proceeds go directly to the Riverfront YMCA's Annual Campaign Fun dedicated to supporting members by making our programs and memberships more accessible.

field_event_description.value:
GRAPE FALLS & CRAFT BREWS

An event benefitting the Riverfront Family YMCA's Annual Campaign

SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 12TH FROM 6-9PM

CHURCH SQUARE - 230 STOW AVE, CUYAHOGA FALLS

We are excited once again for our 22nd Annual Grape Falls & Craft Brews event! This is a wonderful evening of wine tasting, craft beer, hors d'oeuvres, live music, and online auction, and FUN! All proceeds go directly to the Riverfront YMCA's Annual Campaign Fund--which is dedicated to supporting members of our community by making our programs and memberships more accessible.

In 2025, you helped us raise over $38,000 for this event!

We cannot do this without you and thank you for the impact you are making for individuals and families in our community. We appreciate you!

Beer & More

 Aeonian Brewing Company   

            Brighten Brewing Company                

Great Lakes Brewing Co.

HiHO Brewing Co. 

Hoppin' Frog Brewery

Lock 15 Brewing Company

McArthur's Brew House

North Water Brewing Company

More to come!

                      Wine                               

                                3 Roses Winery - The Press Room

                                    Lost Trail Winery & Vineyard

                                      The Winery at Wolf Creek

                             West Main Street Winery & Brewery

                                        More to come!           

                                     Food & More

                                    Dba Catering by Mark Difeo

                                            Oh So Sweet

 

Live Band

The Lees Brothers Band   

 

Purchase Your Tickets Now:

Online at GrapeFalls2026.givesmart.com
Text GrapeFalls26 to 76278
Give us a call at 330-923-9622 or in-house at our Riverfront Y

attributes.name: title
attributes.content: P.S. I Love You 2026 | YMCA Akron

field_event_description.value:
SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 19
@ 9 A.M.

Join the Kohl Family Y and celebrate the Middlebury neighborhood in an annual tribute to Patrick Steurer. 

Run or Walk the engaging 5K or 1M trek and enjoy the sites, sounds and flavor of this thriving Akron community, and this year, if you so choose, you can bring your dog with you on this trek!

This year, the PS I Love You race is proud to be part of the Akron Promise City Series.

REGISTER

SPONSOR
